stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"learning the rules alone was a little challenging but fun","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"moving so many object to an objective wasn't something I've played recently ","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"the graphics was basic and the movement too slow","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I think this is a unique game with unique mechanics I haven't played in a while"}
